zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hutchinson於大約1516年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Richard Hutchinson31歲，母親Elena Peryam25歲。他於大約1539年與Mrs Richard Hutchinson在英國英格蘭越可爾維可哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年3月8日在英國倫敦享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hutchinson于大约1516年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Richard Hutchinson31岁，母亲Elena Peryam25岁。他于大约1539年与Mrs Richard Hutchinson在英国英格兰越可爾維可哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年3月8日在英国倫敦享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hutchinson was born about 1516, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Hutchinson, was 31 and his mother, Elena Peryam, was 25. He married Mrs Richard Hutchinson about 1539, in Wykeham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 March 1560, in London, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Hutchinson est né environ 1516, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hutchinson, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elena Peryam, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Richard Hutchinson environ 1539, à Wykeham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mars 1560, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Hutchinson um 1516 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hutchinson 31 und seine Mutter Elena Peryam 25. Er hat um 1539 in Wykeham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs Richard Hutchinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. März 1560 im Alter von 45 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hutchinson è nato il circa 1516 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Hutchinson, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elena Peryam, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Richard Hutchinson circa 1539, nel Wykeham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1560, nel London, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hutchinsonが約1516年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Hutchinsonは31歳，母Elena Peryamは25歳であった。約1539年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウイケハムでMrs Richard Hutchinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年3月8日にイギリスロンドンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hutchinson(이)가 대략 1516년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hutchinson(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena Peryam(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1539년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 윈이케함에서 Mrs Richard Hutchinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 3월 8일 영국 런던에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hutchinson nasceu aproximadamente 1516, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hutchinson, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elena Peryam, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Richard Hutchinson aproximadamente 1539, em Wykeham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de março de 1560, em London, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hutchinson родился около 1516 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hutchinson было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elena Peryam, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Richard Hutchinson около 1539 г. в местности викэам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 марта 1560 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Hutchinson nació aproximadamente 1516, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Hutchinson, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elena Peryam, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mrs Richard Hutchinson aproximadamente 1539, en Wykeham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1560, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
